sections.title: Geometric Stabilization and the Dark Dimension
The End-of-the-World Brane
sections.note: P0-DECOMP II.B re-grounding (landing-2 aftermath): rebound from the superseded k3/k3-prime pair to the single head k3-prime2, plus k3b-coordinate-dictionary. Confirmed by direct read: eq. (2) is the flat-sliced Poincare metric, eq. (4) the Israel junction condition, eq. (5) T3 = 6/(kappa5^2 L) stated 'independent of z0'. This is k3-prime2 part (i) only, the flat-sliced special case, and nothing more; II.B's own prose stops at eq. (10) and states no dS-sliced result and no state dependence. The physical background the framework actually works in is dS-sliced (k3-prime2 part (ii)): T_eff = (6/kappa5^2 L) coth(z0/L), supercritical, deviating from critical by order (L/l_dS)^2, about 10^-64. The state-dependent tension law (k3-prime2 part (iii), corrected landing-2 Track B) is T_eff = T3 + V(v(F_Q)), response coefficient sinh^2(u_b). Neither the dS-sliced result nor the state-dependent law is written into this section's own text; both are carried only in k3-prime2's own statement. The bridge between II.B's flat-sliced z0 coordinate and the dS-sliced u_b coordinate that parts (ii) and (iii) use is k3b-coordinate-dictionary's exact identity ln(z0/L) = u_b. A reader of this note should take away that II.B presents a special case; the general result lives in the graph, not in the section's prose. The four imports are unchanged, their locators still citing the audit artifacts that rederive this same eq. (4)/(5) pair.

sections.title: Categorical Exclusions
sections.note: Body now hosts the Karch-Randall moduli-geodesic Swampland Distance Conjecture result: the distance d = M_Pl ln(z_0/L) + c_0, the exact response law delta d(V) = -(M_Pl/2) ln(1 + V/rho_tilde), the Kaluza-Klein descent m_KK ~ exp(-d/M_Pl), and the finite excursion (|delta d| = 0.347 M_Pl at |V| = rho_Lambda, infinite only as V -> -rho_Lambda). k3b-reconciliation2 (the distance composition, independently-rechecked) and the k3b-coordinate-dictionary identity it rests on are firm; c23-sdc-prime2 (SDC compliance and KK descent, asserted) is stated conditional on S-CC-002 closure (b > 1/(4 pi^2) for the X_F13 Pati-Salam tower on dP_3). Executes the P0-DECOMP II.B operator ruling that parked these two claims against a future track writing the hosting body text.
